title: GET_KEY_PACKAGE and GET_HPKE_KEY not rate-limited; authenticated client can issue unlimited DB reads
description: BROADCAST, SEALED_BROADCAST, GROUP_SEND, and SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST go through check_rate_limit. GET_KEY_PACKAGE and GET_HPKE_KEY do not. An authenticated client can call GET_KEY_PACKAGE in a tight loop, each call executing a DB query, without any throttling. GET_KEY_PACKAGE without device_id runs a full index scan over key_packages for a pub_id.
